{{Short description|Italian film festival in 2018}} {{Use dmy dates|date=March 2024}} {{Infobox Film festival |name = 75th Venice International Film Festival |image = VeniceFilmFestival75poster.jpg |caption = Festival poster | opening = ''[[First Man (film)|First Man]]'' | closing = ''[[Driven (2018 film)|Driven]]'' | location = [[Venice]], [[Italy]] | founded = 1932 | awards = [[Golden Lion]]:
''[[Roma (2018 film)|Roma]]'' | host = [[Michele Riondino]] |artistic_director= [[Alberto Barbera]] | date = 29 August – 8 September 2018 | website = [http://www.labiennale.org/en/cinema/ Website] | chronology = Venice Film Festival | preceded_by = [[74th Venice International Film Festival|74th]] | followed_by = [[76th Venice International Film Festival|76th]] }} The '''75th [[Venice Film Festival|Venice International Film Festival]]''' was held from 29 August to 8 September 2018, at [[Venice Lido]] in [[Italy]]. Mexican filmmaker [[Guillermo del Toro]] was the jury president for the main competition.{{cite web|title=Guillermo del Toro President of the Venezia 75 International Jury|url=http://www.labiennale.org/en/news/guillermo-del-toro-president-venezia-75-international-jury|access-date=12 February 2018|work=La Biennale di Venezia|date=12 February 2018|archive-date=17 April 2019|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190417074807/https://www.labiennale.org/en/news/guillermo-del-toro-president-venezia-75-international-jury|url-status=live}}{{cite web |url=https://variety.com/2018/film/news/guillermo-del-toro-preside-venice-film-festival-jury-1202694985/ |title=Guillermo Del Toro to Head Venice Film Festival Jury |work=Variety |date=12 February 2018 |access-date=23 July 2018 |archive-date=23 July 2018 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180723122651/https://variety.com/2018/film/news/guillermo-del-toro-preside-venice-film-festival-jury-1202694985/ |url-status=live }} Italian actor [[Michele Riondino]] hosted the opening and closing nights of the festival.{{cite web |date=6 June 2018 |title=Riondino to host Venice opening, closing |url=http://www.ansa.it/english/news/lifestyle/arts/2018/06/06/riondino-to-host-venice-opening-closing_cd9c2c74-2366-44ef-898b-9ad56ba00df5.html |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180723212459/http://www.ansa.it/english/news/lifestyle/arts/2018/06/06/riondino-to-host-venice-opening-closing_cd9c2c74-2366-44ef-898b-9ad56ba00df5.html |archive-date=23 July 2018 |access-date=23 July 2018 |work=ANSA}} The [[Golden Lion]] was awarded to ''[[Roma (2018 film)|Roma]]'' by [[Alfonso Cuarón]].{{cite web |date=8 September 2018 |title=Venice Film Festival: Alfonso Cuaron's 'Roma' Wins Golden Lion (Complete Winners List) |url=https://variety.com/2018/film/news/venice-film-festival-complete-list-of-winners-updated-live-1202933206/ |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180909114906/https://variety.com/2018/film/news/venice-film-festival-complete-list-of-winners-updated-live-1202933206/ |archive-date=9 September 2018 |access-date=9 September 2018 |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]]}} The festival poster was made by Italian artist [[Lorenzo Mattotti]], who designed it in the way "that attracts the eye, that attracts thought, but without revealing too much."{{cite web|title=The 75th Venice International Film Festival|url=https://fg-arttravelint.com/the-75th-venice-international-film-festival|access-date=9 September 2018|work=fg-arttravelint.com|date=27 August 2018|archive-date=9 September 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180909035640/https://fg-arttravelint.com/the-75th-venice-international-film-festival|url-status=live}} The festival opened with ''[[First Man (film)|First Man]]'' by [[Damien Chazelle]],{{cite news |date=19 July 2018 |title=Ryan Gosling's Neil Armstrong movie to open Venice Film Festival |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-44884023 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180720113616/https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-44884023 |archive-date=20 July 2018 |access-date=19 July 2018 |work=BBC News}} and closed with ''[[Driven (2018 film)|Driven]]'' by [[Nick Hamm]]. ==Juries== The juries of the 75th Venice Festival consist of:{{cite web |title=75. Mostra Internazionale d'Arte Cinematografica |url=https://asac.labiennale.org/attivita/cinema/annali?anno=2018 |website=[[labiennale.org]] |access-date=26 July 2025}} === Main Competition (''Venezia 75'') === *[[Guillermo del Toro]], Mexican filmmaker - Jury President{{cite web|title=Venezia 75: Naomi Watts, Taika Waititi, Christoph Waltz e Paolo Genovese membri della giuria del concorso|url=http://www.awardstoday.it/2018/07/venezia-75-naomi-watts-taika-waititi.html|access-date=26 July 2018|work=AwardsToday|date=25 July 2018|archive-date=26 July 2018|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180726040828/http://www.awardstoday.it/2018/07/venezia-75-naomi-watts-taika-waititi.html|url-status=live}} *[[Sylvia Chang]], Taiwanese actress, writer, singer, producer and director *[[Trine Dyrholm]], Danish actress, singer and songwriter *[[Nicole Garcia]], French actress, film director and screenwriter *[[Paolo Genovese]], Italian director and screenwriter *[[Małgorzata Szumowska]], Polish film director, screenwriter and producer *[[Taika Waititi]], New Zealand film director, screenwriter and actor *[[Christoph Waltz]], Austrian actor *[[Naomi Watts]], British actress === Orizzonti === *[[Athina Rachel Tsangari]], Greek filmmaker -
